src/main/java/fr/backend/app/config/Swag.general_idea: Explicitly configure the security filter chain to be stateless by disabling session creation, aligning with JWT-based authentication.
Replace complex path-based CSRF ignoring logic with a global CSRF disable, consistent with the stateless API design.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property and compiler source/target to 21 to support the new JDK.
Remove the spring-boot-starter-parent to manage dependencies explicitly, likely to avoid implicit version conflicts or for stricter control.
Introduce a dependencyManagement section to centralize version definitions for libraries.
Explicitly define and apply the Lombok version in properties and dependencies.
Explicitly define and apply the Liquibase version for database migrations.
Explicitly define and apply the PostgreSQL driver version.
Explicitly define and apply the H2 database version for testing.
Explicitly define and apply the Spring Security version.
Explicitly define and apply the Spring Boot version to all starters and plugins.
Add SonarQube project properties for code quality analysis integration.
Add the Maven Surefire plugin with an explicit version to ensure test execution compatibility.
Configure the Spring Boot Maven plugin to build container images with a specific naming convention.
Rename the project groupId, artifactId, name, and description to reflect the new project identity.

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI runner image from an external included project to a local Maven image with Eclipse Temurin JDK 21.
Configure Maven to use a local settings file for repository resolution.
Define cache paths for Maven repository and build targets to speed up subsequent runs.
Explicitly define the pipeline stages for release, init, test, build, push, and deploy.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
stages:
  - ".pre"
  - release
  - init
  - test
  - build
  - push
  - deploy

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to enforce Maven rules during release tags.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
check-snapshots:
  stage: release
  script:
    - mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} enforcer:enforce

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to set the project version based on the release tag name.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
set-version:
  stage: release
  script:
    - export RELEASE_VERSION=$(echo ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} | sed 's/^RELEASE_//')
    - mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} versions:set -DnewVersion=${RELEASE_VERSION}

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to extract Maven project properties (groupId, artifactId, version) into an environment file.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
extract-props:
  stage: init
  script:
    - export GROUP_ID=$(mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} help:evaluate -Dexpression=project.groupId -q -DforceStdout)

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Include network diagnostic commands in the property extraction job to troubleshoot connectivity issues.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
script:
    - echo "=== 🔍 DIAGNOSTIC RÉSEAU ==="
    - nslookup repo.maven.apache.org

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to run Java unit tests using Maven.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
test-java:
  stage: test
  script:
    - mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} test

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to run SonarQube code analysis.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
sonarqube:
  stage: test
  script:
    - mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} verify org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to compile and package the Java application.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
build-java:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} clean package -DskipTests

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to generate Docker Compose configuration files for different environments.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
build-stacks:
  stage: build
  image: docker:27.5.1-cli
  script:
    - docker compose ... config > ../../../target/docker-compose-${ENV}.yml

.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Add a job to package the generated Docker Compose files into a JAR artifact.
.gitlab-ci.yml.human_impl:
push-stacks:
  stage: push
  script:
    - jar cf stack.jar docker-compose-*.yml

.vscode/launch.json.general_idea: Update the VS Code launch configuration schema version to 0.2.0.
Add missing space in the configuration name for better readability.
Update the main class path to reflect the new package structure.
Remove configuration fields that are no longer needed or supported in the current setup.
Add an empty args field to the launch configuration.

dev-env/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Configure Keycloak to automatically import the realm configuration on startup.
Set Keycloak to use an in-memory H2 database for development purposes.
Remove explicit network and volume definitions that are no longer needed or were redundant.
dev-env/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: removed networks: default and volumes: local_pgdata definitions

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Switch the Docker image reference from a generic Maven-based variable to a GitLab CI-specific registry variable.

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Changed the Keycloak issuer URI from a Docker service name to localhost to accommodate local development environment changes.
Added configuration to extract roles from the 'realm_access.roles' claim in Keycloak JWTs and prefix them with 'ROLE_'.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Activate the inclusion of the version 1.0.0 database changelog file in the master Liquibase configuration.
